headline: Newmont’s LunR Stake Adds New Angle To Undervalued Growth Story
summary: Newmont (NYSE:NEM) received a significant stake in LunR through a dividend in kind from Lundin Gold. The position represents more than 13% of LunR's issued shares, giving Newmont a meaningful ownership interest. The company has said it will review this holding over time while remaining aligned with Canadian securities regulations. Newmont is primarily known for its global gold mining operations. Taking a sizable position in LunR marks a clear move to broaden its portfolio. For investors,...
